op.text: Q4 planning described as 'bloodbath'; staying online until eleven most nights as of early October 2025. Work stress causing interpersonal strain.

op.note: Work described as 'still a grind' in September; by early October Q4 planning is 'bloodbath' with eleven-hour days. Pattern of work stress leaking into personal relationships emerging (snapped at Sam twice in recent months about work pressure). Dana self-aware: 'not mad at him, mad at the laptop.'

op.text: Jury duty dismissed after one day when case settled (early October 2025); Dana described as 'rare gift from the state of Oregon.'
